html:
Exclusive to:

Coffee is a Crock Pot recipe introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It is made by combining 3 Roasted Coffee Beans and 1 Dairy, Sweetener, or a fourth Roasted Coffee Bean.

Coffee provides a movement speed increase of 5 for half a Day (4 real minutes). For characters with no other speed buffs the base speed is 6, therefore this increment translates to the character moving about 83% faster. The speed buff also applies while on a Boat or while using a Walking Cane or a Sleek Hat, stacking their effects while equipped.

Prerequisites

  • Requires:
  • Optional: or

Recipe

×3

Filler must be Roasted Coffee Beans, Dairy, or Sweetener.

Examples

×3

×3

×3

Trivia

  • Coffee was introduced in the Wilbur Vs. the Volcano update.
  • Mobs that consume Coffee (or Roasted Coffee Beans) will also gain the extra movement speed.
  • The loss of Sanity when drinking Coffee may be a reference to the collateral effect of tachycardia and general sense of anxiety when people get addicted to it.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cà phê là một công thức Nồi Hầm được giới thiệu trong DLC ​​Shipwrecked. Nó được tạo ra bằng cách kết hợp 3 Hạt cà phê rang và 1 Sữa, Chất làm ngọt hoặc Hạt cà phê rang thứ tư.

'''Coffee''' is a [[Crock Pot]] recipe introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is made by combining 3 [[Roasted Coffee Beans]] and 1 [[Dairy]], [[Sweetener]], or a fourth Roasted Coffee Bean.

Coffee provides a movement [[Player Speed|speed]] increase of 5 for half a [[Day]] (4 real minutes). For [[characters]] with no other speed buffs the base speed is 6, therefore this increment translates to the character moving about 83% faster. The speed buff also applies while on a [[Boats|Boat]] or while using a [[Walking Cane]] or a [[Sleek Hat]], stacking their effects while equipped.

== Prerequisites ==
* Requires: [[File:Cooked Coffee Beans.png|link=Roasted Coffee Beans]]
* Optional: [[File:Dairy.png|link=Dairy]] <big>or</big> [[File:Sweetener.png|link=Sweetener]]

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Cooked Coffee Beans
|count1 = 3
|item2 = filler
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Coffee
|note = Filler must be [[Roasted Coffee Beans]], [[Dairy]], or [[Sweetener]].
}}

== Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Cooked Coffee Beans
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Cooked Coffee Beans
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Coffee
}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Cooked Coffee Beans
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Butter
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Coffee
}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Cooked Coffee Beans
|count1 = 3
|item2 = Honey
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Coffee
}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Coffee was introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked#February 4th, 2016 - Wilbur Vs. The Volcano Update|Wilbur Vs. the Volcano]]'' update.
* Mobs that consume Coffee (or Roasted Coffee Beans) will also gain the extra movement speed.
*The loss of [[Sanity]] when drinking Coffee may be a reference to the collateral effect of tachycardia and general sense of anxiety when people get addicted to it.
